description: Payabli is an embedded payments platform for software companies, covering pay-in, pay-out, and payment operations workflows. Its documentation describes APIs, embedded components, SDKs, testing resources, and AI-agent access tools.
summary: Payabli exposes an authenticated REST API for payments/operations and a documentation MCP server for AI tools; official server SDKs are published for eight languages but no standalone CLI or GraphQL API was documented.
